case_title: VALDES, MCCONNELL vs. OCEAN PACIFIC APPAREL CORPORATION et al

docket_entries.description: PROCESS COMPLETE- SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT IN FULL FILED
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF VALDES, MCCONNELL AS TO DEFENDANT OCEAN PACIFIC APPAREL CORPORATION BERKELEY INTERNATIONAL CAPITAL CORP.

APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF VALDES, MCCONNELL AS TO DEFENDANT OCEAN PACIFIC APPAREL CORPORATION BERKELEY INTERNATIONAL CAPITAL CORP.
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED BY PLAINTIFF

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VALDES, MCCONNELL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OCEAN PACIFIC APPAREL CORPORATION BERKELEY INTERNATIONAL CAPITAL CORP. $8,485.20 PRINCIPAL, $564.59 INTEREST, $83.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,132.79 ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
